prompt: The Timer fires only once instead of repeatedly. What is the bug?
choices: javax.swing.Timer fires on the main thread, not the EDT
setRepeats(false) makes the Timer a one-shot timer; it fires once after the delay and stops; to repeat, remove the call or use setRepeats(true)
Timer requires a JFrame to be visible before it will fire
The Timer delay of 1000ms is too long; use 100ms for reliable repeating
explanation: By default, javax.swing.Timer repeats. Calling setRepeats(false) overrides this to make it fire exactly once. Fix: remove setRepeats(false) or change it to setRepeats(true) to restore continuous firing every 1000ms on the EDT.
